title: Global Illumination in C++
description: C++ crafted ray tracer. Simulates light, shadows, and reflections.

title: Procedural Planet in THREE.js
description: Procedurally created planet using noise to generate terrain, clouds, and stars.

title: Web App for Selecting Courses
description: Bachelor's thesis on a web app for selecting master's courses, created with React.js and Google Firebase to manage users and the database.

title: Animated Short in Blender
description: An animated short film created from scratch in Blender, where I handled some animations, lighting, and props. Link to the short film: youtube.com/animated-short

title: Singing Web Game in P5.js
description: This is a singing game created using the JavaScript library p5.js, designed for creative coding. I primarily managed user inputs. Visit the link for more: itch.io/sjungande-phadderister

title: Chatbot using Machine Learning
description: A Python chatbot using TF-IDF and cosine similarity. The chatbots processes a conversational dataset, extracts features, and engages in text-based conversations.

title: Curling Simulation in Unreal Engine 5
description: This project investigates the movement of curling stones, employing Euler Approximation to simulate friction and the curling effect. Made in Unreal Engine 5.

title: The Iconic Blender Guru Donut
description: I followed the The Blender Guru Donut tutorial that covers basics like modeling, texturing, and rendering in Blender, helping users create a detailed donut scene.
